manifest.author: zlovatt
manifest.description: Trims unnecessary whitespace from your Obsidian documents
manifest.name: Trim Whitespace

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Formatting of project by @husjon in https://github.com/zlovatt/obsidian-trim-whitespace/pull/30
* Update project setup by @husjon in https://github.com/zlovatt/obsidian-trim-whitespace/pull/31
* fix(TrimWhitespace): updated type signature by @husjon in https://github.com/zlovatt/obsidian-trim-whitespace/pull/32
* Update release workflow by @husjon in https://github.com/zlovatt/obsidian-trim-whitespace/pull/33
* Fix: Trim-on-save by @husjon in https://github.com/zlovatt/obsidian-trim-whitespace/pull/37
* Add: Option for converting non-breaking spaces by @husjon in https://github.com/zlovatt/obsidian-trim-whitespace/pull/35
* Add: Option for preserving a set amount of lines at the end of the file by @husjon in https://github.com/zlovatt/obsidian-trim-whitespace/pull/36

## New Contributors
* @husjon made their first contribution in https://github.com/zlovatt/obsidian-trim-whitespace/pull/30

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/zlovatt/obsidian-trim-whitespace/compare/0.3.0...0.4.0

releases.name: v0.4.0-0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### Added

- Jest test suite (thanks @velebit!)
- Setting to preserve leading characters if part of an indented list
- Setting to control whether `CTRL/CMD + S` trims document

### Changed

- Auto-Trim to skip currently-active text block ([\#5](https://github.com/zlovatt/obsidian-trim-whitespace/issues/5))
- Trimming via `CTRL/CMD + S` no longer requires Auto-Trim to be enabled ([\#12](https://github.com/zlovatt/obsidian-trim-whitespace/issues/12))
- "Skip Code Blocks" setting name to "Preserve Code Blocks"
- Improved detection of code blocks

### Fixed

- Trimming of indented lists ([\#9](https://github.com/zlovatt/obsidian-trim-whitespace/issues/9))
- Plugin not loading on iOS (thanks @velebit!) ([\#14](https://github.com/zlovatt/obsidian-trim-whitespace/issues/14))
- Typo in settings ([\#16](https://github.com/zlovatt/obsidian-trim-whitespace/issues/16))
- Issue trimming code blocks containing template literals ([\#17](https://github.com/zlovatt/obsidian-trim-whitespace/issues/17))

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### Changed

- "Cmd/Ctrl+S" triggers auto-trim, if enabled (#6)

### Fixed

- "Skip code blocks" failing with multiple nearby code fences (#8)
- "Skip code blocks" misplacing selection cursors in documents containing code

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### Fixed

- "Skip code blocks" failing if more than 10 code blocks present in document (#7)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### Added

- Setting to control minimum time delay between auto-trim (#1)
- Option to skip code blocks (#4)

### Changed

- Mechanism used for auto-trimming
- 'Multiple Characters' to only trim inline characters (#2)

### Fixed

- 'Multiple Characters' trimming within tables (#3)
